data.description:
# Release nava-rebar 0.6.0 across all three distribution channels

## What
Cut the 0.6.0 release (266 commits since v0.5.2; 73 feat / 57 fix / 19 refactor,
incl. workflow engine, completion verifier, plan-review calibration) and update
every channel per `docs/releasing.md`.

## Scope
- Version bump in lockstep: `pyproject.toml` `version`, `server.json` top-level
  `version` and `packages[0].version` -> `0.6.0` (one commit).
- Tag `v0.6.0` -> `.github/workflows/release.yml` publishes to **PyPI** via OIDC.
- **Homebrew tap** `navapbc/homebrew-rebar` `Formula/rebar.rb`: update `url` + `sha256`
  to the new PyPI sdist.
- **MCP Registry** `server.json` published via `mcp-publisher`.
- Post-release smoke test: `pipx install 'nava-rebar[mcp]==0.6.0' --force` then
  `scripts/probe-rebar.sh` against the shipped artifact.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` and `server.json` (both version fields) read `0.6.0`; local
      `python -m build && twine check dist/*` passes.
- [ ] `v0.6.0` tag pushed; `release.yml` run is green and PyPI shows 0.6.0 live.
- [ ] Homebrew formula `url`/`sha256` point at the 0.6.0 sdist; `brew style` passes.
- [ ] MCP Registry lists `io.github.navapbc/rebar` at 0.6.0.
- [ ] `probe-rebar.sh` against the published build prints `PROBE RESULT: N passed, 0 failed`.
data.title: Release nava-rebar 0.6.0 (PyPI + Homebrew + MCP Registry)
